title: Apartment sales fell by 13% YoY and 6% QoQ to 98,761 units in January-March quarter
description: According to NSE-listed real estate data analytics company PropEquity, housing sales fell by 13% YoY and 6% QoQ to 98,761 units while launches fell by 19% YoY and 8% QoQ to 92,411 units in January-March 2026
